name: Ability Capsule

effect: Allows Mimikyu to upgrade Play Rough to a Z-Move, Let's Snuggle Forever.

name: Mind Plate
effect: Increases power of Psychic-type moves. Changes Arceus' type to Psychic.

name: Miracle Seed
effect: Increases the power of Grass-type moves.

name: Misty Seed
effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts Sp. Def on Misty Terrain. It can only be used once.

name: Moomoo Milk
effect: Restores 100 HP.

name: Moon Ball
effect: A Poké Ball for catching Pokémon that evolve using the Moon Stone.

name: Moon Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Muscle Band
effect: Increases the power of Physical-category moves.

name: Muscle Feather
effect: Increases Attack EVs by 1.

name: Mystic Water
effect: Increases the power of Water-type moves.

name: Nanab Berry
effect: A Berry to be used in cooking. Calms a Pokémon in battle, in Let's Go Pikachu/Eevee.

name: Nest Ball
effect: Catches lower level wild Pokémon with a higher rate (up to 4x for level 1).

name: Net Ball
effect: Catches Water- and Bug-type Pokémon with 3.5x the rate of a standard Poké Ball.

name: Never-Melt Ice
effect: Increases the power of Ice-type moves.

name: Nomel Berry
effect: A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Normal Gem
effect: Increases the power of a Normal-type move only once.

name: Normalium Z
effect: Allows the use of Breakneck Blitz, the Normal type Z-Move.

name: Nugget
effect: A nugget of pure gold that gives off a lustrous gleam. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

name: Occa Berry
effect: Weakens a supereffective Fire-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

name: Odd Incense
effect: Increases the power of Psychic-type moves. Breeding Mr. Mime produces Mime Jr. when held.

name: Odd Keystone
effect: A vital item that is needed to keep a stone tower from collapsing. Voices can be heard from it occasionally.

name: Old Amber
effect: A piece of amber that contains the genetic material of an ancient Pokémon. It is clear with a reddish tint.

name: Old Gateau
effect: Heals all major status conditions.

name: Oran Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon, it heals the user by just 10 HP.

name: Oval Charm
effect: An oval charm said to increase the chance of Pokémon Eggs being found at the Day Care.

name: Oval Stone
effect: Evolves Happiny when held.

name: Pamtre Berry
effect: A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Paralyze Heal
effect: Cures a Pokémon of paralysis.

name: Park Ball
effect: A special Poké Ball for the Pal Park.

name: Pass Orb
effect: A mysterious orb containing the power of the Unova region, to be used when generating Pass Power.

name: Passho Berry
effect: Weakens a supereffective Water-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

name: Payapa Berry
effect: Weakens a supereffective Psychic-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

name: Pearl
effect: A somewhat-small pearl that sparkles in a pretty silver color. It can be sold cheaply to shops.

name: Pearl String
effect: Very large pearls that sparkle in a pretty silver color. A maniac will buy them for a high price.

name: Pecha Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon, it recovers from poison.

name: Permit
effect: A permit that is needed to enter the Nature Preserve. Not many know about it.

name: Persim Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon, it recovers from confusion.

name: Petaya Berry
effect: Raises Special Attack when HP is low.

name: Pidgeotite
effect: Enables Pidgeot to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Pikanium Z
effect: Allows Pikachu to upgrade Volt Tackle to a Z-Move, Catastropika.

name: Pikashunium Z
effect: Allows Pikachu in a cap to upgrade Thunderbolt to a Z-Move, 10,000,000 Volt Thunderbolt.

name: Pinap Berry
effect: A Berry to be used in cooking. Increases chances of getting items when a Pokémon is caught, in Pokémon Let's Go.

name: Pink Apricorn
effect: A pink Apricorn. It has a nice, sweet scent.

name: Pink Nectar
effect: The flower nectar obtained at the flowering shrubs on Royal Avenue. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon.

name: Pink Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Cute aspect in a Contest.

name: Pinsirite
effect: Enables Pinsir to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Pixie Plate
effect: Increases power of Fairy-type moves. Changes Arceus' type to Fairy.

name: Plasma Card
effect: A card key needed to enter the password inside the Plasma Frigate.

name: Plume Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that flew in the sky in ancient times. It appears to be part of its wing.

name: Poison Barb
effect: Increases the power of Poison-type moves.

name: Poison Gem
effect: Increases the power of a Poison-type move only once.

name: Poison Memory
effect: Changes Silvally and its move Multi-Attack to Poison type.

name: Poisonium Z
effect: Allows the use of Acid Downpour, the Poison type Z-Move.

name: Poké Ball
effect: Catches wild Pokémon.

name: Poké Doll
effect: A doll that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

name: Poké Toy
effect: An item that attracts Pokémon. Use it to flee from any battle with a wild Pokémon.

name: Pomeg Berry
effect: Increases Friendship but lowers HP EVs.

name: Potion
effect: Restores 20 HP.

name: Power Anklet
effect: A Pokémon held item that promotes Speed gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

name: Power Band
effect: A Pokémon held item that promotes Sp. Def gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

name: Power Belt
effect: A Pokémon held item that promotes Defense gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

name: Power Bracer
effect: A Pokémon held item that promotes Attack gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

name: Power Herb
effect: A single-use item to be held by a Pokémon. It allows the immediate use of a move that charges on the first turn.

name: Power Lens
effect: A Pokémon held item that promotes Sp. Atk gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

name: Power Plant Pass
effect: This pass serves as an ID card for gaining access to the power plant that lies along Route 13.

name: Power Weight
effect: A Pokémon held item that promotes HP gain on leveling, but reduces the Speed stat.

name: PP Max
effect: Raises the maximum PP of a move to its maximum.

name: PP Up
effect: Raises the maximum PP of a move.

name: Premier Ball
effect: Catches wild Pokémon; received after buying 10 Poké Balls.

name: Pretty Feather
effect: Can be sold for a high price.

name: Primarium Z
effect: Allows Primarina to upgrade Sparkling Aria to a Z-Move, Oceanic Operetta.

name: Prism Scale
effect: Evolves Feebas when traded holding the item.

name: Prison Bottle
effect: Transforms Hoopa Confined to Hoopa Unbound.

name: Prof's Letter
effect: A letter that Professor Sycamore wrote to your mother. A faint but pleasant perfume seems to cling to the paper.

name: Protective Pads
effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. These pads protect the holder from effects caused by making direct contact with the target.

name: Protector
effect: Evolves Rhydon when traded holding the item.

name: Protein
effect: Increases Attack EVs by 10.

name: Psychic Gem
effect: Increases the power of a Psychic-type move only once.

name: Psychic Memory
effect: Changes Silvally and its move Multi-Attack to Psychic type.

name: Psychic Seed
effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It boosts Sp. Def on Psychic Terrain. It can only be used once.

name: Psychium Z
effect: Allows the use of Shattered Psyche, the Psychic type Z-Move.

name: Pure Incense
effect: Descreases the likelihood of meeting wild Pokémon. Breeding Chimecho produces Chingling when held.

name: Purple Nectar
effect: A flower nectar obtained at Poni Meadow. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon.

name: Qualot Berry
effect: Increases Friendship but lowers Defense EVs.

name: Quick Ball
effect: Catches wild Pokémon with a higher rate (5x) on the first turn of a battle.

name: Quick Candy
effect: Increases a Pokémon's Speed stat by 1.

name: Quick Candy L
effect: Increases a Pokémon's Speed stat.

name: Quick Candy XL
effect: Increases a Pokémon's Speed stat.

name: Quick Claw
effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. A light, sharp claw that lets the bearer move first occasionally.

name: Quick Powder
effect: Increases Speed when held by Ditto.

name: Rabuta Berry
effect: A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Rage Candy Bar
effect: Heals all major status conditions.

name: Rare Bone
effect: A bone that is extremely valuable for Pokémon archeology. It can be sold for a high price to shops.

name: Rare Candy
effect: Raises a Pokémon's level by 1.

name: Rawst Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon, it recovers from a burn.

name: Razor Claw
effect: Increases critical-hit ratio. Evolves Sneasel when held at night.

name: Razor Fang
effect: May cause opponent to flinch. Evolves Gligar when held at night.

name: Razz Berry
effect: A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Reaper Cloth
effect: Evolves Dusclops when traded holding the item.

name: Red Apricorn
effect: A red Apricorn. It assails your nostrils.

name: Red Card
effect: A card with a mysterious power. When the holder is struck by a foe, the attacker is removed from battle.

name: Red Flute
effect: A toy flute made from red glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Red Nectar
effect: A flower nectar obtained at Ula'ula Meadow. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon.

name: Red Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Cool aspect in a Contest.

name: Red Shard
effect: A small red shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Relic Band
effect: A bracelet made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Copper
effect: A copper coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Crown
effect: A crown made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Gold
effect: A gold coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Silver
effect: A silver coin used in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Statue
effect: A stone figure made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Relic Vase
effect: A vase made in a civilization about 3,000 years ago. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Repeat Ball
effect: Catches Pokémon already registered in the Pokédex with 3.5x the rate of a standard Poké Ball.

name: Repel
effect: An item that prevents weak wild Pokémon from appearing for 100 steps after its use.

name: Reset Urge
effect: When used, it restores any stat changes of an ally Pokémon.

name: Resist Feather
effect: Increases Defense EVs by 1.

name: Reveal Glass
effect: A looking glass that reveals the truth. It's a mysterious glass that returns a Pokémon to its original shape.

name: Revival Herb
effect: Revives a Pokémon to max HP, but lowers Friendship.

name: Revive
effect: Revives a fainted Pokémon, restoring half its HP.

name: Rindo Berry
effect: Weakens a supereffective Grass-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

name: Ring Target
effect: Moves that would otherwise have no effect will land on the Pokémon that holds it.

name: Rock Gem
effect: Increases the power of a Rock-type move only once.

name: Rock Incense
effect: Increases the power of Rock-type moves. Breeding Sudowoodo produces Bonsly when held.

name: Rock Memory
effect: Changes Silvally and its move Multi-Attack to Rock type.

name: Rockium Z
effect: Allows the use of Continental Crush, the Rock type Z-Move.

name: Rocky Helmet
effect: If the holder of this item takes damage, the attacker will also be damaged upon contact.

name: Roller Skates
effect: Attaches roller skates to the bottom of your shoes, allowing you to glide quickly around and perform tricks.

name: Root Fossil
effect: A fossil of an ancient Pokémon that lived in the sea. It appears to be part of a plant root.

name: Rose Incense
effect: Increases the power of Grass-type moves. Breeding Roselia or Roserade produces Budew when held.

name: Roseli Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon, this Berry will lessen the damage taken from one supereffective Fairy-type attack.

name: Roto Bargain
effect: Reduces the prices of products at Poké Marts by half.

name: Roto Boost
effect: Raises all stats of your battling Pokémon.

name: Roto Catch
effect: Increases the chance to catch Pokémon a lot.

name: Roto Encounter
effect: Increases the chance of encountering high-level wild Pokémon a lot for a certain period of time.

name: Roto Exp. Points
effect: Increases the Exp. Points your Pokémon receive after battle a little.

name: Roto Friendship
effect: Helps Pokémon in your party grow friendly faster.

name: Roto Hatch
effect: Helps Eggs hatch faster.

name: Roto HP Restore
effect: Fully restores the HP of your battling Pokémon.

name: Roto PP Restore
effect: Fully restores the PP of your battling Pokémon.

name: Roto Prize Money
effect: Triples the prize money you receive after battle.

name: Roto Stealth
effect: Prevents you from encountering wild Pokémon for a certain period of time.

name: Rowap Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon and a special attack lands, the attacker also takes damage.

name: Sablenite
effect: Enables Sableye to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Sachet
effect: Evolves Spritzee when traded holding the item.

name: Sacred Ash
effect: Revives all fainted Pokémon and fully restores their HP.

name: Safari Ball
effect: Catches Pokémon in the Safari Zone or Great Marsh.

name: Safety Goggles
effect: Prevents damage from weather and powder.

name: Salac Berry
effect: Raises Speed when HP is low.

name: Salamencite
effect: Enables Salamence to Mega Evolve during battle.

effect: Enables Sceptile to Mega Evolve during battle.

effect: Enables Scizor to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Scope Lens
effect: Increases critical-hit ratio.

effect: Increases the power of Water-type moves. Breeding Marill or Azumarill produces Azurill when held.

effect: Heals all major status conditions.

name: Sharp Beak
effect: Increases the power of Flying-type moves.

name: Sharpedonite
effect: Enables Sharpedo to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Shiny Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

effect: Pure salt that can be discovered deep inside the Shoal Cave. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

effect: Weakens a supereffective Ground-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

effect: Increases the power of Normal-type moves.

effect: Increases the power of Bug-type moves.

name: Sitrus Berry
effect: If held by a Pokémon, it heals the user's HP a little.

effect: Increases power of Flying-type moves. Changes Arceus' type to Flying.

effect: Enables Slowbro to Mega Evolve during battle.

effect: Increases a Pokémon's Special Attack stat by 1.

effect: Increases a Pokémon's Special Attack stat.

effect: Increases a Pokémon's Special Attack stat.

effect: Allows Snorlax to upgrade Giga Impact to a Z-Move, Pulverizing Pancake.

effect: Raises Attack if hit by an Ice-type move.

name: Soda Pop
effect: Restores 50 HP.

effect: Increases the power of Ground-type moves.

effect: Allows Solgaleo to upgrade Sunsteel Strike to a Z-Move, Searing Sunraze Smash.

effect: A shard of a pretty gem that sparkles in a red color. It can be sold at a high price to shops.

effect: Increases Speed EVs by 1.

effect: Increases Friendship but lowers Speed EVs.

name: TMV Pass
effect: A commuter pass that allows the holder to ride the TMV between Lumiose City and Kiloude City at any time.

name: Tough Candy
effect: Increases a Pokémon's Defense stat by 1.

name: Tough Candy L
effect: Increases a Pokémon's Defense stat.

name: Tough Candy XL
effect: Increases a Pokémon's Defense stat.

name: Toxic Orb
effect: An item to be held by a Pokémon. It is a bizarre orb that badly poisons the holder in battle.

name: Toxic Plate
effect: Increases power of Poison-type moves. Changes Arceus' type to Poison.

name: Twisted Spoon
effect: Increases the power of Psychic-type moves.

name: Tyranitarite
effect: Enables Tyranitar to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Ultra Ball
effect: Catches wild Pokémon with 2x the rate of a Poké Ball.

name: Ultranecrozium Z
effect: Allows Ultra Necrozma to upgrade Photon Geyser to a Z-Move, Light That Burns the Sky.

name: Upgrade
effect: Evolves Porygon when traded holding the item.

name: Venusaurite
effect: Enables Venusaur to Mega Evolve during battle.

name: Wacan Berry
effect: Weakens a supereffective Electric-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

name: Water Gem
effect: Increases the power of a Water-type move only once.

name: Water Memory
effect: Changes Silvally and its move Multi-Attack to Water type.

name: Water Stone
effect: Evolves certain species of Pokémon.

name: Waterium Z
effect: Allows the use of Hydro Vortex, the Water type Z-Move.

name: Watmel Berry
effect: A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Wave Incense
effect: Increases the power of Water-type moves. Breeding Mantine produces Mantyke when held.

name: Weakness Policy
effect: Sharply raises Attack and Special Attack if hit by a super-effective move.

name: Wepear Berry
effect: A Berry which is very rare in the Unova region. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Whipped Dream
effect: Evolves Swirlix when traded holding the item.

name: White Apricorn
effect: A white Apricorn. It doesn't smell like anything.

name: White Flute
effect: A toy flute made from white glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: White Herb
effect: An item to be held by a POKéMON. It restores any lowered stat in battle. It can be used only once.

name: Wide Lens
effect: Increases the accuracy of moves.

name: Wiki Berry
effect: Restores HP if it's low, but may cause confusion.

name: Wise Glasses
effect: Increases the power of Special-category moves.

name: X Accuracy
effect: Raises Accuracy of a Pokémon in battle.

effect: Sharply raises Accuracy of a Pokémon in battle.

name: X Accuracy 3
effect: Drastically raises Accuracy of a Pokémon in battle.

name: X Accuracy 6
effect: Immensely raises Accuracy of a Pokémon in battle.

effect: Drastically raises Attack of a Pokémon in battle.

name: X Attack 6

name: Yache Berry
effect: Weakens a supereffective Ice-type attack against the holding Pokémon.

name: Yellow Apricorn
effect: A yellow Apricorn. It has an invigorating scent.

name: Yellow Flute
effect: A toy flute made from yellow glass. A maniac will buy it for a high price.

name: Yellow Nectar
effect: A flower nectar obtained at Melemele Meadow. It changes the form of certain species of Pokémon.

name: Yellow Scarf
effect: Raises holder's Tough aspect in a Contest.

name: Yellow Shard
effect: A small yellow shard. It appears to be from some sort of implement made long ago.

name: Zap Plate
effect: Increases power of Electric-type moves. Changes Arceus' type to Electric.

name: Zinc
effect: Increases Special Defense EVs by 10.

name: Zoom Lens
effect: Raises a move's accuracy if the holder moves after its target.
